definition: Relative abundance index reported by camera-trap studies
comparable_conditions: Comparable only when independent-event threshold and sampling design are recorded
cautions: Do not use RAI without numerator denominator and event threshold
notes: SRC000001 reports RAI formula on PDF p.4.

formula: sum active days across functioning camera stations
comparable_conditions: Comparable when malfunction days and station count are known
cautions: Do not confuse survey duration with camera-days
